hero.title:
Rethinking energy.
Acting economically.
hero.subtitle: Financing solutions, industrial energy systems and large-scale battery storage from a single source.
trust.text: We scale the energy transition: From 400kV high-voltage connection to GWh battery storage. We combine exclusive market access with technical program management for institutional investors.
about.title: About HBEE
about.intro: With over 25 years of experience in the energy industry, we are experts in providing electricity across industries for diverse applications at attractive conditions. With our sound management and financial expertise, we secure your long-term investment success.
about.focus: Our focus: Efficiency, sustainability and economic scalability.
about.point1: Industrial energy supply solutions: Maximum protection of your energy needs and production processes.
about.point2: Large-scale battery storage and grid integration: Power backup, grid stabilization and minimization of electricity price risks.
about.point3: Energetic integration of data centers: Combination of battery storage, network infrastructure and provision of necessary infrastructure for hyperscalers.
card3.front: Competence: Trusted advisor for financial investors, companion for all investor concerns regarding the project
services.title: Services
services.intro: We have the necessary interface competence to secure your investment and project security.
services.description: We see ourselves as advocates for our financial partners. Our goal is to manage the complexity of high-voltage technology and energy markets in such a way that a transparent, risk-optimized and highly scalable asset is created for the investor. We create and manage systemically relevant assets with sustainable added value for your investments.
service1.title: Financial Engineering & Asset Strategy
service1.desc: We don't just mediate capital, we structure investor-ready, validated business cases. We integrate modern marketing concepts such as multi-use stacking, arbitrage trading and system services as well as energy use for industry and other applications.
service2.title: Technical Program Management
service2.desc: Our support in technology for investors and projects goes far beyond individual tasks or project management. Ensuring connectivity up to the 400kV level, integration of transformers and switching stations, fiber optic connections for real-time monitoring. Technology selection of GWh battery storage, inverters, etc. and quality assurance through commissioning are part of our program management.
service2.point1: Connection to the 400 kV grid including planning of transformer stations.
service2.point2: Ensuring connectivity via dark fiber for real-time monitoring.
service2.point3: Accompanying technology selection (LFP, Na-Ion) and quality assurance through commissioning.
service3.title: Market Access, Regulatory & Networking
service3.desc: Through direct access to grid operators and decision-makers in the energy industry, we qualify and develop concepts for sites and projects in the pre-market phase. We speak the language of grid operators and understand the regulatory framework to successfully manage complex approval processes (incl. BImSchG, NAP procedures).
cta.title: Ready for the next level of your energy supply investments?
